title: RemoveExplosionEffects
description: Client-side Fabric mod that hides explosion particles and lets you toggle them with /explosion.
body:
# RemoveExplosionEffects

RemoveExplosionEffects is a client-side Fabric mod that hides explosion particles for cleaner visibility.

This mod is useful if explosion effects block your view during combat or make the screen feel too cluttered. It removes explosion particles on the client only and adds a simple command so you can turn the effect on or off at any time.

## Features

- Hides explosion particles client-side
- Simple toggle command
- Does not require server installation

## Commands

- `/explosion` — shows the current state
- `/explosion on` — shows explosion particles
- `/explosion off` — hides explosion particles

## Notes

- Client-side only
